data.title: Replace positive-presence design-wireframe assertions with negative-constraint stub assertions; add .test-index RED markers
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh has 7 design-wireframe-specific assertions: 5 positive-presence (check for text that WON'T be in the stub → fail post-stub) and 2 negative (no_hardcoded_flask, no_hardcoded_jinja2 → will pass with stub). Remove the 5 positive-presence assertions and add 4 new assertions that enforce stub structural invariants. These 4 new assertions fail against the current 1006-line SKILL.md (RED phase).

Changes:
1. Remove from test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh: test_design_wireframe_has_fallback_warning, test_design_wireframe_has_generic_glob_fallback, test_design_wireframe_has_heuristic_fallback, test_design_wireframe_references_adapter_loaded, test_design_wireframe_uses_config_driven_adapter
2. Keep: test_design_wireframe_no_hardcoded_flask, test_design_wireframe_no_hardcoded_jinja2
3. Add 4 new assertions using assert_eq / assert_pass_if_clean (assert.sh pattern):
   - test_design_wireframe_stub_no_sub_agent_guard: ! grep -q 'SUB-AGENT-GUARD' SKILL.md (fails against current)
   - test_design_wireframe_stub_no_phase_markup: ! grep -q '## Phase' SKILL.md (fails against current)
   - test_design_wireframe_stub_no_adapter_refs: ! grep -q 'ADAPTER_FILE' SKILL.md (fails against current)
   - test_design_wireframe_stub_has_redirect_text: grep -q 'ui-designer' SKILL.md (fails against current — 0 occurrences confirmed)
4. .test-index: Add 4 RED markers (source mapping already exists):
   [test_design_wireframe_stub_no_sub_agent_guard]
   [test_design_wireframe_stub_no_phase_markup]
   [test_design_wireframe_stub_no_adapter_refs]
   [test_design_wireframe_stub_has_redirect_text]

The 4 new assertions are negative-constraint (absence checks) and metadata-validation (redirect target text), both accepted categories per the behavioral testing standard.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits 0 (4 RED markers cover the new failing assertions)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] 5 positive-presence assertions removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'test_design_wireframe_has_fallback_warning' tests/skills/test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh
- [ ] 4 new assertions present
  Verify: grep -q 'test_design_wireframe_stub_no_sub_agent_guard' tests/skills/test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh
- [ ] 2 existing negative assertions retained
  Verify: grep -q 'test_design_wireframe_no_hardcoded_flask' tests/skills/test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh
- [ ] 4 RED markers added to .test-index
  Verify: grep -c '^\[test_design_wireframe_stub' .test-index | grep -q '^4$'
- [ ] 4 new assertions fail against current SKILL.md (RED confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-design-skills-cross-stack.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL.*stub'
